But we haven't gotten the actual content. We might be "not_ready". However the frontier says recommended frontier actions: expand_file. So we are not ready yet; we need to get evidence. Not yet acquired. I'd choose "evidence_visible". The instruction: readiness_state can be "not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit".
